phoneticUs: 藢p瑟r蓹藞d蓱藧k藢si藧n; 藢p瑟r蓹藞d蓱藧ks瑟n
examples: Vitamin B6 is also called pyridoxine.
Vitamin B6 or pyridoxine deficiency can result in dermatitis or eczema.
Evidence from case histories suggests that pyridoxine levels could be increased.
Each bottle of Stampede has 140 micrograms, or 7% of the recommended daily allowance, of pyridoxine.
The race was one of 21 events Schwartz will hit in Texas, Florida and Wisconsin this year to market Stampede Light, enhanced with thiamine, riboflavin, niacin, pyridoxine and folate.
